mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_post(user_id, title, content, category, status, view_count, reply_count, created_at) VALUES(#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, IFNULL(NULLIF(#{category}, ''), '综合'), 0, 0, 0, NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id as userId, title, category, LEFT(content,200) as summary, accepted_reply_id as acceptedReplyId, view_count as viewCount, reply_count as replyCount, DATE_FORMAT(created_at,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt FROM forum_post WHERE status = 0
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND category = #{category}
ORDER BY is_pinned DESC, created_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id as userId, title, category, content, accepted_reply_id as acceptedReplyId, view_count as viewCount, reply_count as replyCount, is_pinned as isPinned, is_featured as isFeatured, DATE_FORMAT(created_at,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt FROM forum_post WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_post SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_post SET reply_count = reply_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_post SET reply_count = CASE WHEN reply_count > 0 THEN reply_count - 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_post SET reply_count = #{replyCount} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id as userId, title, category, LEFT(content,200) as summary, status, accepted_reply_id as acceptedReplyId, is_pinned as isPinned, is_featured as isFeatured, view_count as viewCount, reply_count as replyCount, DATE_FORMAT(created_at,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt FROM forum_post
WHERE (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY is_pinned DESC, created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_post SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_post SET is_pinned = #{isPinned} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_post SET is_featured = #{isFeatured} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO forum_post_favorite(post_id, user_id, created_at) VALUES(#{postId}, #{userId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM forum_post_favorite WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM forum_post_favorite WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_post SET accepted_reply_id = #{replyId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
UPDATE forum_post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = IFNULL(NULLIF(#{category}, ''), '综合'), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
UPDATE forum_post SET status = 2, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status != 2
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_post_report(post_id, user_id, reason, status, created_at) VALUES(#{postId}, #{userId}, #{reason}, 0, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE reason = VALUES(reason), status = 0, handled_by = NULL, handled_at = NULL, handle_note = NULL, created_at = NOW()
mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.post_id as postId, p.title as postTitle, p.category as category, r.user_id as userId, u.username as reporterUsername, u.nickname as reporterNickname, r.reason, r.status, r.handle_note as handleNote, r.handled_by as handledBy, hu.username as handledByUsername, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(r.handled_at,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as handledAt FROM forum_post_report r LEFT JOIN forum_post p ON p.id = r.post_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN users hu ON hu.id = r.handled_by WHERE 1 = 1
AND r.status = #{status}
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY r.status ASC, r.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_post_report SET status = #{status}, handle_note = #{handleNote}, handled_by = #{handledBy}, handled_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.user_id as userId, p.title, p.category, LEFT(p.content,200) as summary, p.accepted_reply_id as acceptedReplyId, p.view_count as viewCount, p.reply_count as replyCount, DATE_FORMAT(f.created_at,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt FROM forum_post_favorite f INNER JOIN forum_post p ON p.id = f.post_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 0
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
